debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

        simpa using (Nat.two_pow_sub_one_le_factorial hk1)
      have hn0 : (0 : ℚ) ≤ (n : ℚ) ^ k := by exact pow_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le n)) k
      have hkfac_pos : (0 : ℚ) < (k.factorial : ℚ) := by
        norm_cast
        exact Nat.factorial_pos k
      have hkpow_pos : (0 : ℚ) < (2 : ℚ) ^ (k - 1) := by
        exact pow_pos (by norm_num) (k - 1)
      exact (div_le_div_left hn0 hkpow_pos hkfac_pos).2 hfac
